[
  {
    "idea": "Weekly Surge In Google Trends For DIY Bicycle Repair Signals Bullish Consumer Discretionary",
    "family": "consumer_stress",
    "data": {
      "source": "Google Trends weekly search interest for 'DIY bicycle repair'",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "Rising interest in DIY bicycle repair indicates increased consumer mobility and discretionary spending on cycling-related goods.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bullish",
      "sector": "XLY",
      "rationale": "Cycling and outdoor leisure products are part of consumer discretionary and benefit from increased DIY repair interest."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter long XLY when weekly Google Trends for 'DIY bicycle repair' rises more than 15% compared to prior 3 weeks average",
      "exit": "Exit after 4 weeks or when trend declines 10% from peak",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 24,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Weekly Google Trends data often shows cycling repair interest spikes seasonally and after weather changes."
  },
  {
    "idea": "Daily Spike In FRED Weekly Jobless Claims Signals Bearish Financials",
    "family": "labor_jobs",
    "data": {
      "source": "FRED weekly initial jobless claims",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "Sudden rise in initial jobless claims indicates increasing labor market stress, pressuring financial sector earnings outlook.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bearish",
      "sector": "XLF",
      "rationale": "Rising unemployment claims reduce loan demand and increase credit risk for financial institutions."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter short XLF if weekly jobless claims increase more than 5% relative to previous week and above 4-week moving average",
      "exit": "Exit after 3 weeks or if claims drop below 4-week moving average",
      "expected_frequency": "high"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 36,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Jobless claims data is weekly and frequently exhibits directional changes aligned with economic cycles."
  },
